name: Chummy MacGregor
abstract: John Chalmers MacGregor (March 28, 1903, in Saginaw, Michigan – March 9, 1973, in Los Angeles, California), better known as Chummy MacGregor, a musician and composer, was the pianist in The Glenn Miller Orchestra from 1936 to 1942. He composed the songs "Moon Dreams", "It Must Be Jelly ('Cause Jam Don't Shake Like That)", "I Sustain the …

about_quotes.speaker: Artie Shaw
about_quotes.evidence: There was one guy in the band I could learn from. He was an arranger... Chummy MacGregor.
about_quotes.doc_title: Artie Shaw — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Jerome
about_quotes.evidence: I want you to be a third partner with me and Chummy MacGregor the piano player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Jerome interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
